title: JJDA-009 Rina Ayana is rubbed by students ... - Rina Ayana (Akari Nanami)
description: Married woman Lina smiled and watched over the polite student living alone living in the next room of the condominium with a maternal look. One day, when Lina visited the student's room for "collecting the membership fee of the condominium management association", the young man seemed to be financially unstable and apologized for not being able to pay immediately. Lina, who has a gentle personality, laughed and forgave her, saying, "I understand, it's okay."
